역대상 7:1.content: Of the sons of Issachar: Tola, and Puah, Jashub, and Shimron, four.

역대상 7:2.content: The sons of Tola: Uzzi, Rephaiah, Jeriel, Jahmai, Ibsam, and Shemuel, heads of their fathers’ houses, of Tola; mighty men of valor in their generations. Their number in the days of David was twenty-two thousand six hundred.

역대상 7:3.content: The son of Uzzi: Izrahiah. The sons of Izrahiah: Michael, Obadiah, Joel, and Isshiah, five; all of them chief men.

역대상 7:4.content: With them, by their generations, after their fathers’ houses, were bands of the army for war, thirty-six thousand; for they had many wives and sons.

역대상 7:5.content: Their brothers among all the families of Issachar, mighty men of valor, listed in all by genealogy, were eighty-seven thousand.

역대상 7:6.content: The sons of Benjamin: Bela, Becher, and Jediael, three.

역대상 7:7.content: The sons of Bela: Ezbon, Uzzi, Uzziel, Jerimoth, and Iri, five; heads of fathers’ houses, mighty men of valor; and they were listed by genealogy twenty-two thousand thirty-four.

역대상 7:8.content: The sons of Becher: Zemirah, Joash, Eliezer, Elioenai, Omri, Jeremoth, Abijah, Anathoth, and Alemeth. All these were the sons of Becher.

역대상 7:9.content: They were listed by genealogy, after their generations, heads of their fathers’ houses, mighty men of valor, twenty thousand two hundred.

역대상 7:10.content: The son of Jediael: Bilhan. The sons of Bilhan: Jeush, Benjamin, Ehud, Chenaanah, Zethan, Tarshish, and Ahishahar.

역대상 7:11.content: All these were sons of Jediael, according to the heads of their fathers’ households, mighty men of valor, seventeen thousand two hundred, who were able to go out in the army for war.

역대상 7:12.content: So were Shuppim, Huppim, the sons of Ir, Hushim, and the sons of Aher.

역대상 7:13.content: The sons of Naphtali: Jahziel, Guni, Jezer, Shallum, and the sons of Bilhah.

역대상 7:14.content: The sons of Manasseh: Asriel, whom his concubine the Aramitess bore. She bore Machir the father of Gilead.

역대상 7:15.content: Machir took a wife of Huppim and Shuppim, whose sister’s name was Maacah. The name of the second was Zelophehad; and Zelophehad had daughters.

역대상 7:16.content: Maacah the wife of Machir bore a son, and she named him Peresh. The name of his brother was Sheresh; and his sons were Ulam and Rakem.

역대상 7:17.content: The sons of Ulam: Bedan. These were the sons of Gilead the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh.

역대상 7:18.content: His sister Hammolecheth bore Ishhod, Abiezer, and Mahlah.

역대상 7:19.content: The sons of Shemida were Ahian, Shechem, Likhi, and Aniam.

역대상 7:20.content: The sons of Ephraim: Shuthelah, Bered his son, Tahath his son, Eleadah his son, Tahath his son,

역대상 7:21.content: Zabad his son, Shuthelah his son, Ezer, and Elead, whom the men of Gath who were born in the land killed, because they came down to take away their livestock.

역대상 7:22.content: Ephraim their father mourned many days, and his brothers came to comfort him.

역대상 7:23.content: He went in to his wife, and she conceived, and bore a son, and he named him Beriah, because there was trouble with his house.

역대상 7:24.content: His daughter was Sheerah, who built Beth Horon the lower and the upper, and Uzzen Sheerah.

역대상 7:25.content: Rephah was his son, and Resheph, and Telah his son, Tahan his son,

역대상 7:26.content: Ladan his son, Ammihud his son, Elishama his son,

역대상 7:27.content: Nun his son, and Joshua his son.

역대상 7:28.content: Their possessions and settlements were Bethel and its towns, and eastward Naaran, and westward Gezer, with its towns; Shechem also and its towns, to Azzah and its towns;

역대상 7:29.content: and by the borders of the children of Manasseh, Beth Shean and its towns, Taanach and its towns, Megiddo and its towns, and Dor and its towns. The children of Joseph the son of Israel lived in these.

역대상 7:30.content: The sons of Asher: Imnah, Ishvah, Ishvi, and Beriah. Serah was their sister.

역대상 7:31.content: The sons of Beriah: Heber and Malchiel, who was the father of Birzaith.

역대상 7:32.content: Heber became the father of Japhlet, Shomer, Hotham, and Shua their sister.

역대상 7:33.content: The sons of Japhlet: Pasach, Bimhal, and Ashvath. These are the children of Japhlet.

역대상 7:34.content: The sons of Shemer: Ahi, Rohgah, Jehubbah, and Aram.

역대상 7:35.content: The sons of Helem his brother: Zophah, Imna, Shelesh, and Amal.

역대상 7:36.content: The sons of Zophah: Suah, Harnepher, Shual, Beri, Imrah,

역대상 7:37.content: Bezer, Hod, Shamma, Shilshah, Ithran, and Beera.

역대상 7:38.content: The sons of Jether: Jephunneh, Pispa, and Ara.

역대상 7:39.content: The sons of Ulla: Arah, Hanniel, and Rizia.

역대상 7:40.content: All these were the children of Asher, heads of the fathers’ houses, choice and mighty men of valor, chief of the princes. The number of them listed by genealogy for service in war was twenty-six thousand men.
